textPlain: This is awesome! Very smooth. I love when people build things to solve their own problems. Hope your son and grandfather enjoy the games :)
Thanks! :)  Can't let a firewall come between families.Your sudoku (https://raunak.io/sudoku) kicksass!
Thanks! :)  I feel like there is a dreadful lack of local-only apps that are runnable on a single simple server, now that everything is overly distributed. Should we bring back more P2P apps?
